name: Sinarmas Land Limited
summary: Sinarmas Land Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property business in Indonesia, China, Malaysia, Singapore, and the United Kingdom. The company engages in the investment and development of township, residential, commercial, industrial, and hospitality-related properties; and ownership and management of hotels and resorts. It also develops resort properties; develops country clubs, golf clubs and courses, and recreational facilities; develops and operates toll roads; develops industrial estates; and provides financing, management and consultancy, educational, hotel and resort marketing agency, nominee, treasury management, and healthcare services. The company was formerly known as AFP Properties Limited and changed its name to Sinarmas Land Limited in April 2011. Sinarmas Land Limited was incorporated in 1994 and is headquartered in Singapore. Sinarmas Land Limited is a subsidiary of Flambo International Limited.
